title: Measurement Units (0x4B)
description: Measurement Units triplet layout. Length and TID are not mapped here; payload starts at offset 2.

elements.name: XoaBase
elements.description: Presentation space unit base for the X axis.

elements.name: YoaBase
elements.description: Presentation space unit base for the Y axis.

elements.name: XoaUnits
elements.description: Presentation space units per unit base for the X axis (unsigned binary, 2 bytes).

elements.name: YoaUnits
elements.description: Presentation space units per unit base for the Y axis (unsigned binary, 2 bytes).

notes: TID for this triplet is X'4B'. Length field (offset 0) and TID (offset 1) are intentionally not mapped per instructions.
